title: seriphidium rigidum
intro: Seriphidium rigidum, also known as the rigid sagebrush, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Western North America. It is a shrub with a woody stem and small, white flowers, often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Seriphidium rigidum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular herbal remedy among those seeking natural health benefits.
